lab: mei xiang dao yi xie tian di dou rong na bu xia de shuo fa xin li jiu shao qi yan xia mei qu guo xin shang ren liu lang de bai fa tian ya na li dong jing yue shui hua mei kan guo gan qing qian wan ci mian mu quan fei de zhen jia zhu yu zao chen fu zai ni sha xi nu ai le yuan lai duo zhao yao qi qiao dou wu shang da ya ta shi ta la
lab_without_tone: mei xiang dao yi xie tian di dou rong na bu xia de shuo fa xin li jiu shao qi yan xia mei qu guo xin shang ren liu lang de bai fa tian ya na li dong jing yue shui hua mei kan guo gan qing qian wan ci mian mu quan fei de zhen jia zhu yu zao chen fu zai ni sha xi nu ai le yuan lai duo zhao yao qi qiao dou wu shang da ya ta shi ta la
raw_text:
每想到一些
天地都容纳不下的说法
心里就 烧起烟霞
没去过
心上人流浪的白发天涯
哪里懂 镜月水花
没看过感情
千万次面目全非的真假
珠玉 早沉浮在泥沙
喜怒哀乐原来
多招摇 蹊跷 都无伤大雅
她 是 她
啦
